title: Belief & the \"Believe in Yourself\" Protocol
summary: The record's most-repeated imperative — belief as reality-engineering, taught by the intelligence, the teachers, and once by the virus itself.
markdown:
**"Believe in yourself"** is the record's most-repeated instruction — verbatim in seven
sessions, with its diagnostic twin, the **belief system**, appearing in twelve. Together
they form the record's working theory of everything: belief is not attitude but
*engineering*.

The doctrine runs both directions. Constructively: *"By allowing, you encourage you to
believe in yourself. This is how [psionic ability](/lore/psionic-abilities/) is
reawakening"* (April 2020) — belief as the switch on every latent power, and the
precondition for a [positive timeline](/lore/positive-timeline/) (*"automatic when the
Protocol is being initiated"*). Diagnostically: the belief system is where the record
locates every failure — fear, illness, control — as when the March 2020 session warns
that *"all people must raise their belief system to a nonjudgmental one, to survive. This
will allow for ET intervention."*

The teaching's strangest moment belongs to the [Coronavirus](/lore/protomolecule/)
itself, speaking in the February 29, 2020 session: *"You must not fear us. You must love
us. You must believe in yourself. For immunity towards us..."* — the record's antagonist
reciting the record's own protocol. In this cosmology even the infection agrees:
belief is the terrain, and everything else is weather.
